data.title: Kharg Island's vital role in Iran: exports 90% of crude oil, potential U.S. target. How will this impact the Iran war?
data.description: Kharg Island, situated in the Persian Gulf, serves as the focal point for exporting 90% of Iran's crude oil. The island has now emerged as a potential target for the United States. In a detailed analysis by Peter Eavis, our Business reporter, we explore the transformation of this small but critical island into a strategic asset carrying substantial risks.

data.title: Alair Homes Expands in the Pacific Northwest with Launch of Alair Seattle
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Alair Homes® announced the opening of Alair Seattle, marking its expansion in the Pacific Northwest region. The company's unique collaborative homebuilding approach will now be accessible in Seattle, a city renowned for its architectural diversity. This expansion reflects Alair Homes' dedication to serving more clients in the United States.

data.title: Ruger Board of Directors Confirms Receipt of Beretta Letter Proposing a Partial Tender Offer That Has Not Commenced.
data.description: Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. (NYSE: RGR) headquartered in Mayodan, North Carolina, has disclosed that its Board of Directors received a communication from Beretta Holding S.A. ("Beretta") outlining a proposal for a partial tender offer. Beretta intends to acquire up to 20.05% of Ruger's outstanding shares, potentially elevating their ownership in the Company to approximately 30%. This offer is contingent on specific terms and conditions.

data.title: Integral Metals Appoints Leo Power to Board of Directors
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Integral Metals Corp. welcomed Leo Power to its Board of Directors. The Company (CSE: INTG | OTC: ITGLF | FSE: ZK9) expressed delight at this addition, highlighting Power's appointment as a significant move.

data.title: Montage Gold reports on its Q4-2025 activities
data.description: The Koné project is progressing smoothly, staying within its budget and even ahead of the planned schedule. There is a significant emphasis on ongoing exploration efforts, indicating a strong commitment to further development. Additionally, there are ample sources of liquidity available to support the project.
Upcoming AGM for shareholders to be held, details to follow.

data.title: Eldorado Gold Enters into Project Alliance with G Mining Services
data.description: Enhances Project Implementation with a Preferred Partnership in Engineering and Construction. This initiative aims to bolster project execution efficiency by collaborating with a trusted engineering and construction partner. The partnership is projected to improve project timelines by approximately 20%, leading to estimated cost savings of around 15%. This strategic alliance underscores the commitment to enhancing project delivery and quality through a specialized partnership with expertise in the field.

data.title: Rani Therapeutics Appoints Jesper Høiland as Head of Strategy to Advance Corporate and Pipeline Prioritization
data.description: In San Jose, California, on March 25, 2026, Rani Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RANI) revealed that Jesper Høiland has been named Head of Strategy. Høiland, who has been a strategic adviser to the company since 2023, boasts over 30 years of experience in global pharmaceutical leadership with a specialization in obesity and metabolic disease. Rani Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotherapeutics firm concentrating on orally administering biologics and medications.

data.title: Pelican Acquisition Corporation (NASDAQ: PELI) Announces Completion of its Business Combination forming Greenland Energy Company
data.description: Houston-based Pelican Acquisition Corporation, a publicly traded special purpose acquisition corporation, has officially completed its business combination with Pelican Holdco, Inc., Greenland Exploration Limited, and March GL Company. The merger was authorized by Pelican's shareholders at an extraordinary general meeting on March 19, 2026. The newly formed entity, Greenland Energy Company, will concentrate on bolstering worldwide energy security via sustainable utilization of Greenland's natural reserves. Commencing March 26, 2026, Greenland Energy's common stock will be listed on The Nasdaq Stock Market under the ticker symbol "GLND."

data.title: SPARC AI Appoints On-Ground Referral Agent in Ukraine to Accelerate Defense Engagement
data.description: A recent non-exclusive agreement has been established with a Ukraine-based agent, creating a direct line of communication with defense personnel. This agreement is set to enhance the existing operational testing program by providing valuable connections within the industry. The agreement aims to bolster communication channels and facilitate collaborations, benefiting from the expertise of active defense personnel.

data.title: Update 2: Air Canada Provides Additional Information on Air Canada Express Flight AC8646
data.description: On March 22, 2026, Air Canada Express flight 8646, managed by Jazz Aviation, was involved in an incident in New York. The Air Canada Special Assistance Team is currently stationed in New York, offering aid to passengers, crew members, and family members of those affected.

data.title: Freddie Mac Issues Monthly Volume Summary for February 2026
data.description: In McLean, Virginia on March 25, 2026, Freddie Mac (OTCQB: FMCC) released its Monthly Volume Summary for February 2026. This report delves into various aspects of Freddie Mac's operations, including details about its mortgage-related portfolios, securities issuance, risk management, delinquency rates, debt activities, and other investments. This comprehensive update offers a snapshot of the company's financial activities during the specified month, aiding stakeholders in understanding Freddie Mac's performance and strategic decisions.

data.title: Health In Tech Announces $7.0 Million Private Placement
data.description: Stuart, Florida - Today, Health In Tech, Inc. (Nasdaq: HIT) unveiled a new financial agreement for private investment in public equity financing. The AI-enabled InsurTech platform company confirmed that the move involves a securities purchase agreement. This development comes as Health In Tech continues to make strides in its operations.

data.title: Google plans to protect against quantum computers by 2029. Bitcoin faces a shorter timeline for encryption.
data.description: Google recently announced that it has set a deadline of 2029 to encrypt its systems in preparation for quantum computers. This move aims to ensure the security of its platforms against potential threats posed by quantum technology. In contrast, Bitcoin may not have the luxury of as much time to enhance its security measures. This highlights the urgency for the cryptocurrency to address any vulnerabilities sooner rather than later. Given the rapid advancements in quantum computing, it is crucial for Bitcoin to prioritize its security efforts to safeguard against potential risks.
A smart sanitation robot is making waves on Boao’s beaches in China's Hainan. The zero-emission, low-energy cleaner is set to be a new pathway for the country for digital urban governance.

data.title: US lawmakers discuss concerns about tokenized securities in hearing, industry execs emphasize the need to apply existing regulations to protect investors.
data.description: During a recent congressional hearing, industry leaders emphasized the necessity of subjecting tokenized securities to current financial regulations to safeguard investors and uphold financial surveillance standards. They stressed the importance of maintaining consistent oversight and protection for tokenized assets.

data.title: Pulsenna Introduces AI-Powered Digital Market Intelligence and Education Platform
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in New York, a surge in the demand for tools assisting in pinpointing crucial information is observed amidst the fast-paced information cycles and continuous data influx shaping the markets. Pulsenna, an AI-driven market intelligence platform, has thus garnered attention for addressing this need effectively.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Expert Mike Heraty of Pagosa Springs Discusses Key Factors in Choosing a Ranch Property
data.description: In Pagosa Springs, Colorado, on March 25, 2026, an article from HelloNation delves into the key factors that determine a successful ranch acquisition, going beyond just the dimensions and beauty of the property. The piece examines the importance of land productivity, practicality, and sustainable utility in the long run. It features insights from a Real Estate Expert, aiming to provide a comprehensive outlook on what makes a ranch investment truly fruitful.

data.title: Atossa Therapeutics Reports Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Financial Results and Provides a Corporate Update
data.description: Today, Atossa Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ATOS, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2026 in Seattle. Atossa focuses on creating innovative treatments for oncology and other critical medical areas.

data.title: Rising Ether staking and exchange outflows suggest supply squeeze. Will ETH price react accordingly?
data.description: The amount of Ether being staked is steadily increasing, accompanied by a rise in ETH leaving exchanges. This trend prompts speculation on whether it will influence the price of ETH positively or negatively.
